items.html: Now we shall explain this division, and say that before these lights rise above to be incorporated in Keter, the name Yod-Hey in Keter is simple, without filling. Yet, there will be filling in them when these lights ascend upward. There are three fillings: in Yods, in Heys, or in Alephs. When only four lights ascend, they are all incorporated in the Nukva, which is the Hey of the name YH in Keter. At that time, the filling of that Hey is in Yod, like this: Hey [comprised of Hey and Yod].
